rationale: As a live sports prediction and odds-tracking dashboard, PPL Board demands an authoritative, high-energy 'command center' feel. Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) combined with a strict dark theme provides the necessary high-contrast tactical minimalism. Deep obsidian backgrounds paired with pure white text and Volt Blue/Electric Blaze accents guarantee scanability and immediate visual recognition of critical live data without visual fatigue.

grid_system.split_view: Left panel (Live Scoreboard, Ball Log) uses col-span-12 lg:col-span-8. Right panel (Predictions, Odds Engine, Models) uses col-span-12 lg:col-span-4.

layout_and_spacing.containers: Use flat rectangular widgets with 1px border (border-white/10). Internal padding must be p-4 or p-6. Use h-full so widgets stretch to match neighbors.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align complex data and tables. Center-align empty states or high-level status indicators (e.g., 'MATCH LIVE').

surface_styles.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm z-50
surface_styles.cards: Tactical Minimalism: Flat solid bg-[#141414], 1px solid border-white/10. No soft shadows. Sharp corners or max rounded-md (4px-6px).
surface_styles.hover_states: Interactive elements must shift surface to bg-[#1E1E1E] and text to pure white. Odds buttons hover should trigger a subtle 1px inner glow border.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky top bar with Logo, Match Selector Dropdown, and primary CTAs. Include clear navigation between Pre-Match, Live Match, and Post-Match screens (using Shadcn Tabs styled as pill buttons).
components_strategy.odds_engine: Must use 'tabular-nums' to prevent horizontal layout shifting when numbers change rapidly. Use conditional text colors (success/danger) when odds fluctuate. Incorporate Framer Motion for subtle background flashes on value changes.
components_strategy.live_scoreboard: High contrast typography. Main score uses H1 size (Barlow Condensed). Run rate and targets use mono font.
components_strategy.charts:
Recharts library. 
- Win Probability: AreaChart with Volt Blue and Electric Blaze gradient fills.
- Manhattan Chart: BarChart with solid Volt Blue columns.
- Radar Chart: PolarAngleAxis for Player attribute predictions.
- Tooltips must be styled with the 'cards' surface style.
components_strategy.playing_xi: List format. Avatar/Icon + Name + Role. Use a dense list (py-2 gap-2) to fit 11 players without excessive scrolling.
components_strategy.ball_log: Horizontal scrolling pill list or dense vertical feed. Highlight Wickets in Danger Red, Boundaries in Warning Yellow or Primary Blue.
components_strategy.algorithm_comparison: Small dense cards or a consolidated table displaying: Pressure Index, DLS Resource, Bayesian, Monte Carlo, Ensemble percentages. Use mini progress-bars or dot indicators.

motion_and_interactions.data_updates: Numbers must count up or flash softly when WebSocket pushes new odds. Do NOT animate the entire container, only the text values.
motion_and_interactions.tabs: Smooth LayoutGroup animation for the active tab indicator.

media_and_assets.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with 'duotone' or 'bold' weight for sports/analytics symbols (e.g., Target, ChartLine, Lightning, Baseball).

match_selector_bg.description: Night cricket match stadium. Use with a heavy bg-black/70 overlay so text remains readable.

player_placeholder.description: Cricket player in action (sweep shot). Use for player prediction models or man-of-the-match highlights.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts in index.html: 'Barlow Condensed', 'DM Sans', 'JetBrains Mono'.
Setup Tailwind config to use these fonts and the specified dark mode color palette (e.g., background: #0A0A0A).
Build a 4-tab interface (Match Selector, Pre-Match, Live Match, Post-Match).
Implement the Live Match screen with a strict 12-column Grid (Left 8 cols for Scoreboard/Ball Log, Right 4 cols for Odds Engine/Algorithms).
CRITICAL: All numbers in the Live Scoreboard and Odds Engine MUST use the 'tabular-nums' Tailwind class to prevent layout jitter.
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, tabs, and odds elements.
Do NOT use HTML inputs for dropdowns; use Shadcn Select/Dropdown components.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for high-level structure (div, section) and Shadcn for interactive UI elements (Tabs, Tables, Badges).
